services/geminiService.ts:const decodeAudioData = async (
services/geminiService.ts:  data: Uint8Array,
services/geminiService.ts:  ctx: AudioContext,
services/geminiService.ts:  sampleRate: number,
services/geminiService.ts:  numChannels: number,
services/geminiService.ts:): Promise<AudioBuffer> => {
services/geminiService.ts:  // Use byteOffset and length to handle slices correctly
services/geminiService.ts:  const dataInt16 = new Int16Array(data.buffer, data.byteOffset, data.length / 2);
services/geminiService.ts:  const frameCount = dataInt16.length / numChannels;
services/geminiService.ts:  const buffer = ctx.createBuffer(numChannels, frameCount, sampleRate);
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:  for (let channel = 0; channel < numChannels; channel++) {
services/geminiService.ts:    const channelData = buffer.getChannelData(channel);
services/geminiService.ts:    for (let i = 0; i < frameCount; i++) {
services/geminiService.ts:      channelData[i] = dataInt16[i * numChannels + channel] / 32768.0;
services/geminiService.ts:    }
services/geminiService.ts:  }
services/geminiService.ts:  return buffer;
services/geminiService.ts:};

services/geminiService.ts:const sleep = (ms: number) => new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));

services/geminiService.ts:async function withRetry<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>, retries = 5, delay = 2000): Promise<T> {
services/geminiService.ts:  try {
services/geminiService.ts:    return await fn();
services/geminiService.ts:  } catch (error: any) {
services/geminiService.ts:    const errorStr = error?.message || (typeof error === 'object' ? (error?.toString() || String(error)) : String(error));
services/geminiService.ts:    const isBusy = 
services/geminiService.ts:      error?.status === 503 || 
services/geminiService.ts:      error?.code === 503 || 
services/geminiService.ts:      errorStr.includes('503') || 
services/geminiService.ts:      errorStr.includes('high demand') ||
services/geminiService.ts:      errorStr.includes('UNAVAILABLE');
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:    if (retries > 0 && isBusy) {
services/geminiService.ts:      console.warn(`Gemini API busy (503), retrying in ${delay}ms... (${retries} retries left)`);
services/geminiService.ts:      await sleep(delay);
services/geminiService.ts:      return withRetry(fn, retries - 1, Math.min(delay * 2, 10000));
services/geminiService.ts:    }
services/geminiService.ts:    throw error;
services/geminiService.ts:  }

services/geminiService.ts:export async function textToSpeech(text: string, voice: 'Kore' | 'Puck' | 'Zephyr' = 'Zephyr') {
services/geminiService.ts:  if (ttsDisabled) return false;
services/geminiService.ts:  try {
services/geminiService.ts:    const ai = getAI();
services/geminiService.ts:    if (!ai) return false;
services/geminiService.ts:    console.log("Synthesizing speech:", text instanceof Error ? text.message : String(text));
services/geminiService.ts:    const response = await withRetry(() => ai.models.generateContent({
services/geminiService.ts:      model: "gemini-2.5-flash-preview-tts",
services/geminiService.ts:      contents: [{ parts: [{ text }] }],
services/geminiService.ts:      config: {
services/geminiService.ts:        responseModalities: [Modality.AUDIO],
services/geminiService.ts:        speechConfig: {
services/geminiService.ts:          voiceConfig: {
services/geminiService.ts:            prebuiltVoiceConfig: { voiceName: voice },
services/geminiService.ts:          },
services/geminiService.ts:        },
services/geminiService.ts:      },
services/geminiService.ts:    }));
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:    console.log("Gemini TTS Response received");
services/geminiService.ts:    
services/geminiService.ts:    let base64Audio: string | undefined;
services/geminiService.ts:    
services/geminiService.ts:    // Iterate through candidates and parts to find audio data
services/geminiService.ts:    if (response.candidates && response.candidates[0]?.content?.parts) {
services/geminiService.ts:      for (const part of response.candidates[0].content.parts) {
services/geminiService.ts:        if (part.inlineData?.data && part.inlineData.mimeType?.includes('audio')) {
services/geminiService.ts:          base64Audio = part.inlineData.data;
services/geminiService.ts:          break;
services/geminiService.ts:        }
services/geminiService.ts:      }
services/geminiService.ts:    }
services/geminiService.ts:
services/geminiService.ts:    if (base64Audio) {
services/geminiService.ts:      console.log("Received audio data, length:", base64Audio.length);
services/geminiService.ts:      try {
services/geminiService.ts:        const audioCtx = getAudioContext();
services/geminiService.ts:        try {
services/geminiService.ts:          if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
services/geminiService.ts:            await audioCtx.resume();
services/geminiService.ts:          }
services/geminiService.ts:        } catch (resumeErr) {
services/geminiService.ts:          console.error("Failed to resume AudioContext:", resumeErr instanceof Error ? resumeErr.message : String(resumeErr));
services/geminiService.ts:        }
services/geminiService.ts:        
services/geminiService.ts:        const binaryString = atob(base64Audio);
services/geminiService.ts:        const bytes = new Uint8Array(binaryString.length);
services/geminiService.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < binaryString.length; i++) {

services/geminiService.ts:export async function fetchAddressSuggestions(query: string, lat: number, lon: number, apiKey: string) {

services/speechService.ts:      speakNative(text);

components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const shouldFetchPois = (lat: number, lon: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (!lastPoiFetchRef.current) return true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const { time, lat: lastLat, lon: lastLon } = lastPoiFetchRef.current;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const now = Date.now();
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (now - time > 15 * 60 * 1000) return true; // 15 minutes
components/NavigationView.tsx:            
components/NavigationView.tsx:            // Calculate distance
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const R = 3958.8; // miles
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const dLat = (lat - lastLat) * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const dLon = (lon - lastLon) * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const a = Math.sin(dLat/2) * Math.sin(dLat/2) +
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      Math.cos(lastLat * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(lat * Math.PI / 180) *
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      Math.sin(dLon/2) * Math.sin(dLon/2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const distance = R * c;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            
components/NavigationView.tsx:            return distance >= 10;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (!isFetchingPoisRef.current && shouldFetchPois(center.lat, center.lng)) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('sharp right')) return CornerDownRight;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('right')) return ArrowRight;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('slight right')) return CornerUpRight;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('straight')) return ArrowUp;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('slight left')) return CornerUpLeft;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('left')) return ArrowLeft;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (modifier.includes('sharp left')) return CornerDownLeft;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (type.includes('roundabout')) return RotateCw;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (type.includes('merge')) return GitMerge;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    return ArrowUp;
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const parseLane = (lane: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const direction = lane.direction.toLowerCase();

components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isLeft = direction.includes('left');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isRight = direction.includes('right');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isSlightLeft = direction.includes('slight left');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isSlightRight = direction.includes('slight right');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isSharpLeft = direction.includes('sharp left');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isSharpRight = direction.includes('sharp right');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const isUTurn = direction.includes('uturn');
components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (isSlightLeft) rotation = -25;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    else if (isLeft) rotation = -45;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    else if (isSharpLeft) rotation = -65;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    else if (isSlightRight) rotation = 25;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    else if (isRight) rotation = 45;

components/NavigationView.tsx:      active: lane.matches.includes('selected'),
components/NavigationView.tsx:      isStraight

components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const lastSpokenRef = useRef('');
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const spokenDistancesRef = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!isDriving || nextInstruction.text === 'Ready for Route') return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const dist = parseFloat(nextInstruction.distance);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (isNaN(dist)) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let shouldSpeak = false;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let phrase = "";
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (nextInstruction.text !== lastSpokenRef.current) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      lastSpokenRef.current = nextInstruction.text;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      spokenDistancesRef.current.clear();
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      shouldSpeak = true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (dist > 2) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        phrase = `Continue for ${dist} miles, then ${nextInstruction.text}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      } else {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        phrase = `In ${dist} miles, ${nextInstruction.text}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (dist <= 2) spokenDistancesRef.current.add('2');
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (dist <= 1) spokenDistancesRef.current.add('1');
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (dist <= 0.2) spokenDistancesRef.current.add('0.2');
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (dist <= 2.0 && dist > 1.9 && !spokenDistancesRef.current.has('2')) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      shouldSpeak = true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      phrase = `In 2 miles, ${nextInstruction.text}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      spokenDistancesRef.current.add('2');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } else if (dist <= 1.0 && dist > 0.9 && !spokenDistancesRef.current.has('1')) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      shouldSpeak = true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      phrase = `In 1 mile, ${nextInstruction.text}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      spokenDistancesRef.current.add('1');

components/NavigationView.tsx:      shouldSpeak = true;

components/NavigationView.tsx:      spokenDistancesRef.current.add('0.2');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (shouldSpeak && phrase) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      speak(phrase);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:  }, [nextInstruction.distance, nextInstruction.text, isDriving]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const [isOffRoute, setIsOffRoute] = useState(false);
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const offRouteCountRef = useRef(0);
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const lastRerouteTimeRef = useRef(0);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const handleReroute = async () => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const now = Date.now();
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (now - lastRerouteTimeRef.current < 10000) return; // Prevent spamming reroutes (10s cooldown)
components/NavigationView.tsx:    lastRerouteTimeRef.current = now;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    console.log("Rerouting initiated...");
components/NavigationView.tsx:    offRouteCountRef.current = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Call handleNavigate without a target to use existing destination/waypoints
components/NavigationView.tsx:    try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      await handleNavigate();
components/NavigationView.tsx:      setIsOffRoute(false);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      console.error("Reroute failed:", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const updateNavigationState = async (currentLocation: [number, number]) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!currentLocation || isNaN(currentLocation[0]) || isNaN(currentLocation[1])) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!routeSteps.length || !routeCoordsRef.current || routeCoordsRef.current.length < 2) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Manual distance calculation to avoid turf.js overhead
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const R = 6371e3; // Earth radius in meters
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const toRad = (val: number) => val * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const calcDist = (lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const phi1 = toRad(lat1);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const phi2 = toRad(lat2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const deltaPhi = toRad(lat2 - lat1);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const deltaLambda = toRad(lon2 - lon1);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const a = Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) * Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) +
components/NavigationView.tsx:                Math.cos(phi1) * Math.cos(phi2) *
components/NavigationView.tsx:                Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2) * Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      return R * c;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Find nearest point on route line manually
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let minDistance = Infinity;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let nearestIndex = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let distOnSegment = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Optimization: only search a window around the last known index to improve performance
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let startIndex = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let endIndex = routeCoordsRef.current.length - 1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (lastSimIdxRef.current !== -1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      startIndex = Math.max(0, lastSimIdxRef.current - 50);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      endIndex = Math.min(routeCoordsRef.current.length - 1, lastSimIdxRef.current + 200);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    for (let i = startIndex; i < endIndex; i++) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const p1 = routeCoordsRef.current[i];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const p2 = routeCoordsRef.current[i+1];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!p1 || !p2) continue;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Calculate distance from point to line segment
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const l2 = Math.pow(p1[0] - p2[0], 2) + Math.pow(p1[1] - p2[1], 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      let t = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (l2 !== 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ((currentLocation[0] - p1[0]) * (p2[0] - p1[0]) + (currentLocation[1] - p1[1]) * (p2[1] - p1[1])) / l2));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const proj = [p1[0] + t * (p2[0] - p1[0]), p1[1] + t * (p2[1] - p1[1])];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const dist = calcDist(currentLocation[0], currentLocation[1], proj[0], proj[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (dist < minDistance) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        minDistance = dist;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        nearestIndex = i;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        distOnSegment = calcDist(p1[0], p1[1], proj[0], proj[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // If we get off route, we might need to search the whole route again
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (minDistance > 500 && lastSimIdxRef.current !== -1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Fallback: search the whole route if we lost track
components/NavigationView.tsx:      for (let i = 0; i < routeCoordsRef.current.length - 1; i++) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (i >= startIndex && i < endIndex) continue; // Already checked
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const p1 = routeCoordsRef.current[i];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const p2 = routeCoordsRef.current[i+1];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (!p1 || !p2) continue;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const l2 = Math.pow(p1[0] - p2[0], 2) + Math.pow(p1[1] - p2[1], 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let t = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (l2 !== 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ((currentLocation[0] - p1[0]) * (p2[0] - p1[0]) + (currentLocation[1] - p1[1]) * (p2[1] - p1[1])) / l2));
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const proj = [p1[0] + t * (p2[0] - p1[0]), p1[1] + t * (p2[1] - p1[1])];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const dist = calcDist(currentLocation[0], currentLocation[1], proj[0], proj[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (dist < minDistance) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          minDistance = dist;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          nearestIndex = i;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distOnSegment = calcDist(p1[0], p1[1], proj[0], proj[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    lastSimIdxRef.current = nearestIndex;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (routeLineRef.current && routeCoordsRef.current.length > nearestIndex) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const remainingCoords = [currentLocation, ...routeCoordsRef.current.slice(nearestIndex + 1)];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      updateMapLine(mapInstanceRef.current, routeLineRef.current.id, remainingCoords, routeLineRef.current.color, 8);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (routeMarkersRef.current.length > 0 && routeCoordsRef.current.length > nearestIndex + 1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const segmentCoords = [currentLocation, routeCoordsRef.current[nearestIndex + 1]];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!currentSegmentLineRef.current) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        updateMapLine(mapInstanceRef.current, 'segment', segmentCoords, '#ffffff', 12);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        currentSegmentLineRef.current = 'segment';
components/NavigationView.tsx:      } else {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        updateMapLine(mapInstanceRef.current, currentSegmentLineRef.current, segmentCoords, '#ffffff', 12);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const distanceFromRoute = minDistance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Check if off-route
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (distanceFromRoute > 300) { // Increased from 150m to 300m to reduce recalculations
components/NavigationView.tsx:        offRouteCountRef.current += 1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (offRouteCountRef.current >= 5) { // Increased from 3 to 5 consecutive updates
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (!isOffRoute && !isCalculating) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                setIsOffRoute(true);

components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } else {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        offRouteCountRef.current = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (isOffRoute) setIsOffRoute(false);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let traveledDistance = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (nearestIndex > 0 && routeDistancesRef.current.length > nearestIndex) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        traveledDistance = routeDistancesRef.current[nearestIndex];
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    traveledDistance += distOnSegment;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const remainingDist = totalRouteDistanceRef.current - traveledDistance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!isNaN(remainingDist)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const remainingMiles = remainingDist / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      setMilesRemaining(remainingMiles);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Weigh Station Alert Simulation
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (initialMiles > 5 && poiFilters.has('weigh_station')) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const weighStationPoint = initialMiles * 0.5; // Halfway point
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const distToWeighStation = remainingMiles - weighStationPoint;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (distToWeighStation > 0 && distToWeighStation <= 2) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:            setWeighStationAlert({ distance: distToWeighStation, status });

components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (distToWeighStation <= 2 && distToWeighStation > 1.9 && !spokenDistancesRef.current.has('ws_2')) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:        } else if (distToWeighStation <= 0 && weighStationAlert) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      } else if (weighStationAlert) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:      }

components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (remainingMiles <= 1.0 && remainingMiles > 0.9 && !spokenDistancesRef.current.has('dest_1')) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let maneuverIndex = -1;

components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (maneuverIndex !== -1) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!isNaN(distanceToManeuver)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const currentStep = routeSteps[maneuverIndex];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (currentStep && currentStep.maneuver && currentStep.maneuver.instruction) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const instruction = currentStep.maneuver.instruction;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const roadNameMatch = instruction.match(/on (.+?) for/);

components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:          // Update ETA based on remaining steps

components/NavigationView.tsx:          }

components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (routeSpansRef.current && routeSpansRef.current.length > 0) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:      }

components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Fallback if no speed limit in span
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!foundLimit && maneuverIndex !== -1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const currentStep = routeSteps[maneuverIndex];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (currentStep && currentStep.maneuver && currentStep.maneuver.instruction) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (roadName.match(/^I\s*[- ]/i)) setCurrentSpeedLimit(70);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          else if (roadName.match(/^US\s*[- ]/i)) setCurrentSpeedLimit(65);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          else if (roadName.match(/^(?:State Route|SR|CA|TX|FL|NY|IL|PA|OH|MI|GA|NC|NJ|VA|WA|AZ|MA|TN|IN|MO|MD|WI|CO|MN|SC|AL|LA|KY|OR|OK|CT|UT|IA|NV|AR|MS|KS|NM|NE|ID|WV|HI|NH|ME|MT|RI|DE|SD|ND|AK|VT|WY)\s*[- ]/i)) setCurrentSpeedLimit(60);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          else setCurrentSpeedLimit(45);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } else if (maneuverIndex !== -1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const currentStep = routeSteps[maneuverIndex];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (currentStep && currentStep.maneuver && currentStep.maneuver.instruction) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const instruction = currentStep.maneuver.instruction;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const roadNameMatch = instruction.match(/on (.+?) for/);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const roadName = roadNameMatch ? roadNameMatch[1] : (instruction.split(' on ')[1] || '');
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (roadName.match(/^I\s*[- ]/i)) setCurrentSpeedLimit(70);

components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!loc) return;

components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (dist < 0.08) return;

components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const getWeatherDetails = (code: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (code === 0) return { condition: 'Clear', icon: Sun };
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (code >= 1 && code <= 3) return { condition: 'Cloudy', icon: Cloud };
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (code === 45 || code === 48) return { condition: 'Fog', icon: Cloud };
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if ((code >= 51 && code <= 67) || (code >= 80 && code <= 82)) return { condition: 'Rain', icon: CloudRain };
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if ((code >= 71 && code <= 77) || code === 85 || code === 86) return { condition: 'Snow', icon: CloudSnow };

components/NavigationView.tsx:  const moveWaypoint = (index: number, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {

components/NavigationView.tsx:      const newWaypoints = [...prev];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (direction === 'up' && index > 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        [newWaypoints[index], newWaypoints[index - 1]] = [newWaypoints[index - 1], newWaypoints[index]];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      } else if (direction === 'down' && index < newWaypoints.length - 1) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        [newWaypoints[index], newWaypoints[index + 1]] = [newWaypoints[index + 1], newWaypoints[index]];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      return newWaypoints;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    });
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };

components/NavigationView.tsx:  const fetchRouteWeather = async (coords: [number, number][], distMi: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (coords.length < 10) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Sample points every ~50 miles for better coverage
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const sampleInterval = Math.max(1, Math.floor(coords.length / (distMi / 50)));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const sampledPoints: { lat: number, lon: number, dist: number }[] = [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      for (let i = sampleInterval; i < coords.length; i += sampleInterval) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        sampledPoints.push({
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lat: coords[i][0],
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lon: coords[i][1],
components/NavigationView.tsx:          dist: (i / coords.length) * distMi
components/NavigationView.tsx:        });
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Always include the destination
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (sampledPoints.length === 0 || sampledPoints[sampledPoints.length - 1].dist < distMi - 5) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        sampledPoints.push({
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lat: coords[coords.length - 1][0],
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lon: coords[coords.length - 1][1],
components/NavigationView.tsx:          dist: distMi
components/NavigationView.tsx:        });
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const forecasts = await Promise.all(sampledPoints.map(async (p) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const res = await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${p.lat}&longitude=${p.lon}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,visibility&temperature_unit=fahrenheit&wind_speed_unit=mph&timezone=auto`);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (!res.ok) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const data = await res.json();
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (!data.current) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const getWeatherDetails = (code: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (code === 0) return { condition: 'Clear', icon: Sun };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (code >= 1 && code <= 3) return { condition: 'Cloudy', icon: Cloud };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (code === 45 || code === 48) return { condition: 'Fog', icon: Cloud };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if ((code >= 51 && code <= 67) || (code >= 80 && code <= 82)) return { condition: 'Rain', icon: CloudRain };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if ((code >= 71 && code <= 77) || code === 85 || code === 86) return { condition: 'Snow', icon: CloudSnow };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (code >= 95 && code <= 99) return { condition: 'Storm', icon: CloudLightning };
components/NavigationView.tsx:          return { condition: 'Clear', icon: Sun };
components/NavigationView.tsx:        };
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const details = getWeatherDetails(data.current.weather_code);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const hoursToPoint = p.dist / 65; 
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const eta = new Date(Date.now() + hoursToPoint * 3600000);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const timeStr = eta.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        // Detect alerts
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const alerts = [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const windSpeed = data.current.wind_speed_10m;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const temp = data.current.temperature_2m;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const visibility = data.current.visibility;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const code = data.current.weather_code;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (windSpeed > 35) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'HIGH WINDS', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: windSpeed > 50 ? 'SEVERE' : 'WARNING', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: `${Math.round(windSpeed)} MPH`,
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: Wind
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (visibility < 1609) { // Less than 1 mile
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'FOG / LOW VIS', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: visibility < 800 ? 'SEVERE' : 'WARNING', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: `${(visibility / 1609).toFixed(1)} MI`,
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: Cloud
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const isIcyCode = [66, 67].includes(code);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const isPrecipitation = (code >= 51 && code <= 65) || (code >= 80 && code <= 82) || (code >= 45 && code <= 48);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (isIcyCode || (temp < 32 && isPrecipitation)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'ICY ROADS', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: 'SEVERE', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: 'Freezing Conditions',
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: CloudSnow
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if ([65, 82].includes(code)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'HEAVY RAIN', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: 'WARNING', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: 'Reduced Traction',
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: CloudRain
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if ([75, 86].includes(code)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'HEAVY SNOW', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: 'SEVERE', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: 'Low Visibility',
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: CloudSnow
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (code >= 95 && code <= 99) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts.push({ 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: 'THUNDERSTORM', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            severity: 'SEVERE', 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            value: 'Severe Weather',
components/NavigationView.tsx:            icon: CloudLightning
components/NavigationView.tsx:          });
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          time: timeStr,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          temp: Math.round(temp),
components/NavigationView.tsx:          icon: details.icon,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          condition: details.condition,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lat: p.lat,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lon: p.lon,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          alerts
components/NavigationView.tsx:        };
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const validForecasts = forecasts.filter(f => f !== null);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (validForecasts.length > 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        setRouteWeatherForecast(validForecasts);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const allAlerts = validForecasts.flatMap(f => f?.alerts.map(a => ({ ...a, time: f.time, lat: f.lat, lon: f.lon, condition: f.condition })) || []);

components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (allAlerts.length > 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const severeAlert = allAlerts.find(a => a.severity === 'SEVERE');
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (severeAlert) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:          } else {

components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      console.error("Failed to fetch route weather", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };

components/NavigationView.tsx:  const geocodeDestination = async (

components/NavigationView.tsx:  const calculateTruckRoute = async (
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLat: number,
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLon: number
components/NavigationView.tsx:  ): Promise<{ coords: [number, number][]; distMi: number; durationSec: number; steps: any[] } | null> => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!HERE_API_KEY || !userLocation) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const heightCm = Math.round(truckProfile.height * 30.48);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const weightKg = Math.round(truckProfile.weight * 0.453592);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const lengthCm = Math.round(truckProfile.length * 30.48);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const widthCm = Math.round(truckProfile.width * 30.48);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const axleWeightKg = Math.round(truckProfile.axleWeight * 0.453592);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const hereUrl = new URL('https://router.hereapi.com/v8/routes');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    hereUrl.searchParams.append('transportMode', 'truck');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    hereUrl.searchParams.append('origin', `${userLocation[0]},${userLocation[1]}`);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    waypoints.forEach(wp => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      hereUrl.searchParams.append('via', `${wp.lat},${wp.lon}`);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    });
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    hereUrl.searchParams.append('destination', `${destLat},${destLon}`);

components/NavigationView.tsx:    const processedRoutes = hereRouteData.routes.map((route: any) => {

components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!summary || isNaN(summary.length) || isNaN(summary.duration)) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const distMi = summary.length / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const durationSec = summary.duration;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const steps = route.sections[0].actions.map((action: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const instruction = (action.instruction || '').replace(/\u003c/g, '<').replace(/\u003e/g, '>');
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const hasTrafficLight = instruction.toLowerCase().includes('traffic light');
components/NavigationView.tsx:        return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          maneuver: { 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            instruction, 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            type: action.action, 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            modifier: action.direction,
components/NavigationView.tsx:            hasTrafficLight
components/NavigationView.tsx:          },
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distance: action.length,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          duration: summary.length > 0 ? (action.length / summary.length) * summary.duration : 0,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          offset: action.offset,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          lanes: (action.lanes || []).map((lane: any) => ({
components/NavigationView.tsx:            direction: (lane.directions || lane.indications || []).join(';'),
components/NavigationView.tsx:            matches: (lane.isRecommended || lane.recommendation === 'recommended') ? ['selected'] : []
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }))
components/NavigationView.tsx:        };
components/NavigationView.tsx:      });
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const coords = decode(route.sections[0].polyline).map((c: any) => [c.lat, c.lng]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const allIncidents = route.sections[0].incidents || [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const alerts = allIncidents.map((incident: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const progress = incident.from.offset / summary.length;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let type = 'INFO';
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let message = incident.description.value;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let icon = Zap;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let color = 'text-orange-400';
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let bg = 'bg-orange-400/10';
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (incident.type === 'Congestion') {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          type = 'TRAFFIC';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          message = `Congestion: ${incident.description.value}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          icon = Zap;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          color = 'text-orange-400';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          bg = 'bg-orange-400/10';
components/NavigationView.tsx:        } else if (incident.type === 'Construction') {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          type = 'HAZARD';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          message = `Construction: ${incident.description.value}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          icon = AlertTriangle;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          color = 'text-yellow-400';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          bg = 'bg-yellow-400/10';
components/NavigationView.tsx:        } else if (incident.criticality.value === 'critical') {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          type = 'HAZARD';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          message = `Critical: ${incident.description.value}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          icon = AlertTriangle;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          color = 'text-red-400';
components/NavigationView.tsx:          bg = 'bg-red-400/10';
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        return { type, message, icon, color, bg, id: incident.id, progress };
components/NavigationView.tsx:      });
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      return { coords, distMi, durationSec, steps, alerts, spans: route.sections[0].spans };
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }).filter(Boolean);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (processedRoutes.length === 0) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // For now, return the first one as primary, but we'll store others in state
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const primaryRoute = processedRoutes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:    setWeatherAlerts(primaryRoute.alerts.sort((a: any, b: any) => a.progress - b.progress));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (primaryRoute.spans) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      routeSpansRef.current = primaryRoute.spans;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Store alternative routes in state if needed
components/NavigationView.tsx:    setAlternativeRoutes(processedRoutes);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    setSelectedRouteIndex(0);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    return processedRoutes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const calculateFallbackRoute = async (
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLat: number,
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLon: number
components/NavigationView.tsx:  ): Promise<{ coords: [number, number][]; distMi: number; durationSec: number; steps: any[] } | null> => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!userLocation) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const waypointCoords = waypoints.map(wp => `${wp.lon},${wp.lat}`).join(';');
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Try OSRM
components/NavigationView.tsx:    try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const osrmUrl = `https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1/driving/${userLocation[1]},${userLocation[0]};${waypointCoords ? waypointCoords + ';' : ''}${destLon},${destLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&steps=true`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const routeRes = await fetch(osrmUrl);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (routeRes.ok) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const routeData = await routeRes.json();
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (routeData.routes && routeData.routes.length > 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const route = routeData.routes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const coords = route.geometry.coordinates.map((c: any) => [c[1], c[0]]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const distMi = route.distance / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const durationSec = route.duration;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const steps = route.legs.flatMap((leg: any) => leg.steps).map((step: any) => ({
components/NavigationView.tsx:            maneuver: { instruction: step.maneuver.instruction, type: step.maneuver.type },
components/NavigationView.tsx:            distance: step.distance,
components/NavigationView.tsx:            duration: step.duration
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }));
components/NavigationView.tsx:          totalRouteDistanceRef.current = route.distance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          return { coords, distMi, durationSec, steps };
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      console.error("OSRM fallback failed", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Try OpenStreetMap.de
components/NavigationView.tsx:    try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const osrmUrl = `https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-car/route/v1/driving/${userLocation[1]},${userLocation[0]};${waypointCoords ? waypointCoords + ';' : ''}${destLon},${destLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&steps=true`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const routeRes = await fetch(osrmUrl);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!routeRes.ok) throw new Error(`Routing failed: ${routeRes.status}`);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const routeData = await routeRes.json();
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!routeData.routes || routeData.routes.length === 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        throw new Error("No route found in OpenStreetMap.de fallback.");
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const route = routeData.routes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const coords = route.geometry.coordinates.map((c: any) => [c[1], c[0]]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const distMi = route.distance / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const durationSec = route.duration;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const steps = route.legs.flatMap((leg: any) => leg.steps).map((step: any) => ({
components/NavigationView.tsx:        maneuver: { instruction: step.maneuver.instruction, type: step.maneuver.type },
components/NavigationView.tsx:        distance: step.distance,
components/NavigationView.tsx:        duration: step.duration
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      totalRouteDistanceRef.current = route.distance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      return { coords, distMi, durationSec, steps };
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      console.error("OSM fallback failed", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const calculateOfflineRoute = (
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLat: number,
components/NavigationView.tsx:    destLon: number
components/NavigationView.tsx:  ): { coords: [number, number][]; distMi: number; durationSec: number; steps: any[] } | null => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!userLocation) return null;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const R = 6371e3; // Earth radius in meters
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const toRad = (val: number) => val * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const lat1 = toRad(userLocation[0]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const lon1 = toRad(userLocation[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const lat2 = toRad(destLat);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const lon2 = toRad(destLon);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const deltaPhi = lat2 - lat1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const deltaLambda = lon2 - lon1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const a = Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) * Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) +
components/NavigationView.tsx:              Math.cos(lat1) * Math.cos(lat2) *
components/NavigationView.tsx:              Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2) * Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const distanceMeters = R * c;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const distMi = distanceMeters / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const durationSec = (distMi / 60) * 3600; // Assume 60mph
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const coords: [number, number][] = [userLocation, [destLat, destLon]];
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const steps = [{
components/NavigationView.tsx:      maneuver: { instruction: `Head straight to destination (Offline Mode)`, type: 'straight', modifier: '' },
components/NavigationView.tsx:      distance: distanceMeters,
components/NavigationView.tsx:      duration: durationSec,
components/NavigationView.tsx:      lanes: []
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }];
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    speak("Network unavailable. Using offline straight-line routing.");
components/NavigationView.tsx:    
components/NavigationView.tsx:    return { coords, distMi, durationSec, steps };
components/NavigationView.tsx:  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const fetchTrafficCams = async (routeCoords: [number, number][], totalMiles: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Mock traffic cams along the route

components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!isTruckRoute) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        // Fallback 1: Project OSRM
components/NavigationView.tsx:        try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const waypointCoords = waypoints.map(wp => `${wp.lon},${wp.lat}`).join(';');
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const osrmUrl = `https://router.project-osrm.org/route/v1/driving/${userLocation[1]},${userLocation[0]};${waypointCoords ? waypointCoords + ';' : ''}${destLon},${destLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&steps=true`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const routeRes = await fetch(osrmUrl);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (routeRes.ok) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const routeData = await routeRes.json();
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (routeData.routes && routeData.routes.length > 0) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:              const route = routeData.routes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:              coords = route.geometry.coordinates.map((c: any) => [c[1], c[0]]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:              routeCoordsRef.current = coords;
components/NavigationView.tsx:              
components/NavigationView.tsx:              if (!isNaN(route.distance) && !isNaN(route.duration)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                distMi = route.distance / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                totalRouteDistanceRef.current = route.distance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                durationSec = route.duration;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                steps = route.legs.flatMap((leg: any) => leg.steps).map((step: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  const maneuverModifier = step.maneuver.modifier || '';
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  const osrmLanes = step.intersections?.[0]?.lanes || [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  const hereLanes = osrmLanes.map((lane: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      const direction = lane.indications.join(';');
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      const isSelected = lane.valid && lane.indications.some((indication: string) => maneuverModifier.includes(indication));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                          direction: direction,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                          matches: isSelected ? ['selected'] : [],
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      };
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  });
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      maneuver: step.maneuver,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      distance: step.distance,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      duration: step.duration,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      lanes: hereLanes,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:                });
components/NavigationView.tsx:                isTruckRoute = true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:              }
components/NavigationView.tsx:            }
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          console.warn("Project OSRM routing failed, trying OpenStreetMap.de fallback.", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (!isTruckRoute) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        // Fallback 2: OpenStreetMap.de OSRM
components/NavigationView.tsx:        try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const waypointCoords = waypoints.map(wp => `${wp.lon},${wp.lat}`).join(';');
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const osrmUrl = `https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-car/route/v1/driving/${userLocation[1]},${userLocation[0]};${waypointCoords ? waypointCoords + ';' : ''}${destLon},${destLat}?overview=full&geometries=geojson&steps=true`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const routeRes = await fetch(osrmUrl);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (!routeRes.ok) throw new Error(`Routing failed: ${routeRes.status}`);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const routeData = await routeRes.json();
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (!routeData.routes || routeData.routes.length === 0) { 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            throw new Error("No route found in OpenStreetMap.de fallback.");
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const route = routeData.routes[0];
components/NavigationView.tsx:          coords = route.geometry.coordinates.map((c: any) => [c[1], c[0]]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          routeCoordsRef.current = coords;
components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:            throw new Error("Invalid route data from OpenStreetMap.de fallback.");
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distMi = route.distance / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          totalRouteDistanceRef.current = route.distance;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          durationSec = route.duration;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          steps = route.legs.flatMap((leg: any) => leg.steps).map((step: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const maneuverModifier = step.maneuver.modifier || '';
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const osrmLanes = step.intersections?.[0]?.lanes || [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:            
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const hereLanes = osrmLanes.map((lane: any) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                const direction = lane.indications.join(';');
components/NavigationView.tsx:                const isSelected = lane.valid && lane.indications.some((indication: string) => maneuverModifier.includes(indication));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    direction: direction,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    matches: isSelected ? ['selected'] : [],
components/NavigationView.tsx:                };
components/NavigationView.tsx:            });
components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:                maneuver: step.maneuver,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                distance: step.distance,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                lanes: hereLanes,
components/NavigationView.tsx:            };

components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          // Offline Fallback: Straight line routing
components/NavigationView.tsx:          console.warn("Attempting offline straight-line routing fallback.");
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const R = 6371e3; // Earth radius in meters
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const toRad = (val: number) => val * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const lat1 = toRad(userLocation[0]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const lon1 = toRad(userLocation[1]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const lat2 = toRad(destLat);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const lon2 = toRad(destLon);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const deltaPhi = lat2 - lat1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const deltaLambda = lon2 - lon1;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const a = Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) * Math.sin(deltaPhi / 2) +
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    Math.cos(lat1) * Math.cos(lat2) *
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2) * Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));

components/NavigationView.tsx:          
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distMi = distanceMeters / 1609.34;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          totalRouteDistanceRef.current = distanceMeters;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          durationSec = (distMi / 60) * 3600; // Assume 60mph

components/NavigationView.tsx:                    Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2) * Math.sin(deltaLambda / 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:          currentDist += R * c;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distances.push(currentDist);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        routeDistancesRef.current = distances;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      } else {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        routeDistancesRef.current = [];

components/NavigationView.tsx:      
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Fetch POIs along the route
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const fetchRoutePOIs = async (points: [number, number][], totalDistMi: number) => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (points.length < 2) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const allRoutePois: any[] = [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (HERE_API_KEY) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            // Sample every ~50 miles for HERE API to get dense coverage along the route
components/NavigationView.tsx:            const hereSampledPoints: [number, number][] = [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:            hereSampledPoints.push(points[0]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:            if (totalDistMi > 50) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:              const numSamples = Math.floor(totalDistMi / 50);
components/NavigationView.tsx:              for (let i = 1; i <= numSamples; i++) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                const idx = Math.floor((i / (numSamples + 1)) * (points.length - 1));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                hereSampledPoints.push(points[idx]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:              }
components/NavigationView.tsx:            } else if (points.length > 20) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:            for (let i = 0; i < hereSampledPoints.length; i += 5) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:              const batch = hereSampledPoints.slice(i, i + 5);
components/NavigationView.tsx:              const promises = batch.map(async (p) => {

components/NavigationView.tsx:                if (!res.ok) return [];

components/NavigationView.tsx:                  if (item.categories?.some((c: any) => c.id === '700-7600-0115')) type = 'Weigh Station';
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  else if (item.categories?.some((c: any) => c.id === '700-7600-0224')) type = 'Rest Area';

components/NavigationView.tsx:                    lat: item.position.lat,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    lon: item.position.lng,
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    type
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  };
components/NavigationView.tsx:                });
components/NavigationView.tsx:              });
components/NavigationView.tsx:              const results = await Promise.all(promises);
components/NavigationView.tsx:              allRoutePois.push(...results.flat());
components/NavigationView.tsx:            }
components/NavigationView.tsx:          } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            console.warn("HERE API POI fetch failed, falling back to Gemini", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));

components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (totalDistMi > 100) {

components/NavigationView.tsx:

components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const upcomingPois = useMemo(() => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (!isDriving || pois.length === 0 || routePoints.length === 0 || !userLocation) return [];
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    // Find user's closest point on route
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let userMinDist = Infinity;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    let userRouteIdx = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    for (let i = 0; i < routePoints.length; i++) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      const d = Math.pow(routePoints[i][0] - userLocation[0], 2) + Math.pow(routePoints[i][1] - userLocation[1], 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (d < userMinDist) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        userMinDist = d;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        userRouteIdx = i;
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const upcoming = pois
components/NavigationView.tsx:      .filter(poi => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (typeof poi.lat !== 'number' || typeof poi.lon !== 'number' || isNaN(poi.lat) || isNaN(poi.lon)) return false;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const category = getPoiCategory(poi.type, poi.name);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        return poiFilters.has(category);
components/NavigationView.tsx:      })
components/NavigationView.tsx:      .map(poi => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let poiMinDist = Infinity;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        let poiRouteIdx = 0;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        for (let i = 0; i < routePoints.length; i++) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          const d = Math.pow(routePoints[i][0] - poi.lat, 2) + Math.pow(routePoints[i][1] - poi.lon, 2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:          if (d < poiMinDist) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            poiMinDist = d;
components/NavigationView.tsx:            poiRouteIdx = i;
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        
components/NavigationView.tsx:        // Rough distance from user to POI in miles
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const R = 3959; // Earth's radius in miles
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const dLat = (poi.lat - userLocation[0]) * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const dLon = (poi.lon - userLocation[1]) * Math.PI / 180;
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const a = Math.sin(dLat/2) * Math.sin(dLat/2) +
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  Math.cos(userLocation[0] * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(poi.lat * Math.PI / 180) *
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  Math.sin(dLon/2) * Math.sin(dLon/2);
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const c = 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1-a));
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const distance = R * c;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:        return {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          ...poi,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          routeIdx: poiRouteIdx,
components/NavigationView.tsx:          distance
components/NavigationView.tsx:        };
components/NavigationView.tsx:      })
components/NavigationView.tsx:      .filter(poi => poi.routeIdx >= userRouteIdx - 5 && poi.distance > 0.5) // Allow slightly behind, but filter out very close ones
components/NavigationView.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance)
components/NavigationView.tsx:      .slice(0, 4); // Show top 4 upcoming
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    return upcoming;
components/NavigationView.tsx:  }, [isDriving, pois, routePoints, userLocation, poiFilters]);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const toggleDriving = () => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (milesRemaining <= 0) return;
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    const newIsDriving = !isDriving;
components/NavigationView.tsx:    setIsDriving(newIsDriving);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:    if (newIsDriving) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Just started driving
components/NavigationView.tsx:      setIsOverviewMode(false); // Ensure we are in follow mode
components/NavigationView.tsx:      setIsNorthUp(false); // Default to Heading Up mode
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (mapInstanceRef.current && userMarkerRef.current) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        // The marker is at the start of the route, which is the user's location
components/NavigationView.tsx:        const startPosition = userMarkerRef.current.getLngLat(); 
components/NavigationView.tsx:        if (startPosition && !isNaN(startPosition.lat) && !isNaN(startPosition.lng)) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:          try {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            mapInstanceRef.current.flyTo({
components/NavigationView.tsx:              center: startPosition,
components/NavigationView.tsx:              zoom: 17, // Zoom level 17 is good for driving
components/NavigationView.tsx:              animate: true,
components/NavigationView.tsx:              duration: 1500 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            });
components/NavigationView.tsx:          } catch (e) {
components/NavigationView.tsx:            console.error("FlyTo error in toggleDriving:", e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e));
components/NavigationView.tsx:          }
components/NavigationView.tsx:        }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:      setIsFollowMode(true);
components/NavigationView.tsx:    } else {
components/NavigationView.tsx:      // Stopped driving
components/NavigationView.tsx:      if (eldStatus?.status === 'DRIVE') {
components/NavigationView.tsx:        setEldStatus?.(prev => ({ ...prev, status: 'ON' }));
components/NavigationView.tsx:      }
components/NavigationView.tsx:    }
components/NavigationView.tsx:  }
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  const [mapError, setMapError] = useState<string | null>(null);
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:  return (
components/NavigationView.tsx:    <div className="h-full w-full relative bg-[#050505] overflow-hidden font-sans">
components/NavigationView.tsx:      {mapError && (
components/NavigationView.tsx:        <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 z-[9999] bg-red-600 text-white p-4 m-4 rounded-lg shadow-xl max-w-[80vw] max-h-[80vh] overflow-auto">
components/NavigationView.tsx:          <h3 className="font-bold mb-2">Map Error</h3>
components/NavigationView.tsx:          <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap break-words">{mapError}</p>
components/NavigationView.tsx:          <button 
components/NavigationView.tsx:            className="mt-4 bg-white text-red-600 px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-bold"
components/NavigationView.tsx:            onClick={() => setMapError(null)}
components/NavigationView.tsx:          >

components/NavigationView.tsx:                    const combinedRaw = [...poiData, ...chainData, ...hereData];
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    const seenInBatch = new Set();
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    const combined = combinedRaw.filter(p => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      const id = `${p.lat}-${p.lon}-${p.name}`;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      if (seenInBatch.has(id)) return false;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      seenInBatch.add(id);
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      return true;
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    });
components/NavigationView.tsx:
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    setPois(prev => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      const existingIds = new Set(prev.map(p => `${p.lat}-${p.lon}-${p.name}`));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      const newPois = combined.filter(p => !existingIds.has(`${p.lat}-${p.lon}-${p.name}`));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                      return [...prev, ...newPois];
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    });
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  })
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  .catch(err => {
components/NavigationView.tsx:                    console.error("Failed to fetch POIs:", err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err));
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  })
components/NavigationView.tsx:                  .finally(() => {

components/NavigationView.tsx:                  });
components/NavigationView.tsx:              }
components/NavigationView.tsx:            }}

components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:const WeatherAnalyticsCard: React.FC = () => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const context = useContext(AppContext);
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const userLocation = context?.userLocation;
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const [weather, setWeather] = useState<WeatherData | null>(null);
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const lastFetchPos = React.useRef<[number, number] | null>(null);
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    async function fetchWeather() {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (!userLocation) return;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      
components/Dashboard.tsx:      console.log('userLocation (Dashboard):', userLocation);
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const [lat, lon] = userLocation;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      
components/Dashboard.tsx:      // Only fetch if we haven't fetched yet or if moved > 5km (~0.045 degrees)
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (lastFetchPos.current) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        const [lastLat, lastLon] = lastFetchPos.current;
components/Dashboard.tsx:        const dist = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(lat - lastLat, 2) + Math.pow(lon - lastLon, 2));
components/Dashboard.tsx:        if (dist < 0.045) return;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:      try {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        // Only show loading pulse on initial load
components/Dashboard.tsx:        if (!weather) setLoading(true);
components/Dashboard.tsx:        
components/Dashboard.tsx:        const geoRes = await fetch(`https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=jsonv2&lat=${lat}&lon=${lon}`, {
components/Dashboard.tsx:           headers: { 
components/Dashboard.tsx:             'Accept-Language': 'en',
components/Dashboard.tsx:             'User-Agent': 'TruckersNav/1.0'
components/Dashboard.tsx:           }
components/Dashboard.tsx:        });
components/Dashboard.tsx:        const geoData = await geoRes.json();
components/Dashboard.tsx:        if (!geoData || !geoData.address) {

components/Dashboard.tsx:  const getWeatherCondition = (code: number) => {

components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (code <= 3) return "Partly Cloudy";
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (code <= 48) return "Foggy";
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (code <= 67) return "Rainy";
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (code <= 77) return "Snowy";
components/Dashboard.tsx:    return "Stormy";
