components/Dashboard.tsx:  const playedAlertsRef = React.useRef<Record<string, Set<number>>>({});
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (hasViolation && !lastViolationRef.current) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      textToSpeech("Attention: Hours of Service violation detected. Immediate stop required.").catch(err => console.error("Violation TTS failed:", err));
components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:    lastViolationRef.current = hasViolation;
components/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [hasViolation]);
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (breakSuggestion && !lastSuggestionRef.current) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      textToSpeech("Stationary detected. Would you like to switch to on duty status?").catch(err => console.error("Break suggestion TTS failed:", err));
components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:    lastSuggestionRef.current = breakSuggestion;
components/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [breakSuggestion]);
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (!eldStatus || eldStatus.status === 'OFF' || eldStatus.status === 'SB') {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      // Clear alerts when off duty
components/Dashboard.tsx:      playedAlertsRef.current = {};
components/Dashboard.tsx:      return;
components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:    eldStatus.timers.forEach(timer => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const { label, seconds } = timer;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (!playedAlertsRef.current[label]) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        playedAlertsRef.current[label] = new Set();
components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:      // Check thresholds: 1 hour (3600), 30 min (1800), 15 min (900)
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const thresholds = [3600, 1800, 900];
components/Dashboard.tsx:      thresholds.forEach(threshold => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        if (seconds <= threshold && seconds > 0 && !playedAlertsRef.current[label].has(threshold)) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:          const minutes = threshold / 60;
components/Dashboard.tsx:          const timeText = minutes >= 60 ? "1 hour" : `${minutes} minutes`;
components/Dashboard.tsx:          textToSpeech(`HOS Warning: ${timeText} remaining for ${label}.`).catch(err => console.error("HOS Warning TTS failed:", err));
components/Dashboard.tsx:          playedAlertsRef.current[label].add(threshold);
components/Dashboard.tsx:        }
components/Dashboard.tsx:      });
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:      // Reset threshold if timer is replenished (e.g. after a break)
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (seconds > 3600) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        playedAlertsRef.current[label].delete(3600);
components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (seconds > 1800) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        playedAlertsRef.current[label].delete(1800);
components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
components/Dashboard.tsx:      if (seconds > 900) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        playedAlertsRef.current[label].delete(900);
components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
components/Dashboard.tsx:    });
components/Dashboard.tsx:  }, [eldStatus]);
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  // ELD Dynamic Timers
components/Dashboard.tsx:  // Removed local timers state as it's now global in AppContext
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    const h = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
components/Dashboard.tsx:    const m = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);
components/Dashboard.tsx:    return `${h}h ${m}m`;
components/Dashboard.tsx:  };
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const getHOSMetric = () => {
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (!eldStatus) return { label: 'Drive Time Left', value: '00:00', progress: 0 };
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:    // 10 Hour Reset (Off Duty or Sleeper Berth)
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (eldStatus.status === 'OFF' || eldStatus.status === 'SB') {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const progress = ((36000 - eldStatus.resetSeconds) / 36000) * 100;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      return { 
components/Dashboard.tsx:        label: '10 HOUR RESET', 
components/Dashboard.tsx:        value: formatTime(eldStatus.resetSeconds), 
components/Dashboard.tsx:        progress 
components/Dashboard.tsx:      };
components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:    // Break Time Left (Stationary for > 10 minutes)
components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (idleSeconds > 600) {
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const breakRemaining = Math.max(0, 1800 - idleSeconds);
components/Dashboard.tsx:      const progress = ((1800 - breakRemaining) / 1800) * 100;
components/Dashboard.tsx:      return {
components/Dashboard.tsx:        label: 'BREAK TIME LEFT',
components/Dashboard.tsx:        value: formatTime(breakRemaining),
components/Dashboard.tsx:        progress
components/Dashboard.tsx:      };
components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:    const driveTimer = eldStatus.timers.find(t => t.label === 'Drive Time');
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:    return { 
components/Dashboard.tsx:      label: 'DRIVE TIME LEFT', 
components/Dashboard.tsx:      value: driveTimer ? formatTime(driveTimer.seconds) : '00:00', 
components/Dashboard.tsx:      progress: driveTimer ? (driveTimer.seconds / driveTimer.total) * 100 : 0 
components/Dashboard.tsx:    };
components/Dashboard.tsx:  };
components/Dashboard.tsx:
components/Dashboard.tsx:  const hosMetric = getHOSMetric();
components/Dashboard.tsx:

components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (!isNaN(amount) && amount > 0) {

components/Dashboard.tsx:    }
components/Dashboard.tsx:  };

components/SettingsView.tsx:const MapDownloadItem: React.FC<{ region: string, size: string, isDownloaded: boolean, onDownload: () => void }> = ({ region, size, isDownloaded, onDownload }) => {

components/SettingsView.tsx:  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);
components/SettingsView.tsx:
components/SettingsView.tsx:  const handleDownload = () => {
components/SettingsView.tsx:    if (isDownloaded || downloading) return;
components/SettingsView.tsx:    setDownloading(true);
components/SettingsView.tsx:    let currentProgress = 0;
components/SettingsView.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(() => {
components/SettingsView.tsx:      currentProgress += Math.random() * 15;
components/SettingsView.tsx:      if (currentProgress >= 100) {
components/SettingsView.tsx:        clearInterval(interval);
components/SettingsView.tsx:        setProgress(100);
components/SettingsView.tsx:        setTimeout(() => {
components/SettingsView.tsx:          setDownloading(false);
components/SettingsView.tsx:          onDownload();
components/SettingsView.tsx:        }, 500);
components/SettingsView.tsx:      } else {
components/SettingsView.tsx:        setProgress(currentProgress);
components/SettingsView.tsx:      }
components/SettingsView.tsx:    }, 200);
components/SettingsView.tsx:  };
components/SettingsView.tsx:
components/SettingsView.tsx:  return (

components/SettingsView.tsx:    
components/SettingsView.tsx:    if (newValue !== null) {

components/SettingsView.tsx:        const num = parseFloat(newValue);
components/SettingsView.tsx:        if (!isNaN(num)) {
components/SettingsView.tsx:          setTruckProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: num }));
components/SettingsView.tsx:        }
components/SettingsView.tsx:      } else {
components/SettingsView.tsx:        setTruckProfile(prev => ({ ...prev, [field]: newValue }));
components/SettingsView.tsx:      }
components/SettingsView.tsx:    }

components/RouteHistory.tsx:  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
components/RouteHistory.tsx:  const [filter, setFilter] = useState<'ALL' | 'COMPLETED' | 'CANCELLED'>('ALL');
components/RouteHistory.tsx:
components/RouteHistory.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

components/RouteHistory.tsx:      ));

components/RouteHistory.tsx:    setHistory(updated);
components/RouteHistory.tsx:    const str = safeStringify(updated);
components/RouteHistory.tsx:    if (str) localStorage.setItem('trucker_route_history', str);

components/RouteHistory.tsx:      item.destination.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());

components/VoiceCommand.tsx:const VoiceCommand: React.FC<VoiceCommandProps> = ({ onClose, setActiveView, setNavTarget }) => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const [input, setInput] = useState('');
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<{role: 'user' | 'ai', text: string, isSpeaking?: boolean}[]>([
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    { role: 'ai', text: 'TRUCKERS NAV System Online. How can I assist your route today?' }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  ]);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    if (scrollRef.current) {

components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    // Initial greeting

components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  }, []);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e?: React.FormEvent) => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    if (e) e.preventDefault();
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    if (!input.trim() || isProcessing) return;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    const userText = input;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    setInput('');
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'user', text: userText }]);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    setIsProcessing(true);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    try {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      const response = await processVoiceCommand(userText);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      const aiResponse = response.text || 'I missed that. Come again?';
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'ai', text: aiResponse, isSpeaking: true }]);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      // Handle function calls
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      if (response.functionCalls) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:        for (const call of response.functionCalls) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:          if (call.name === 'navigate_to') {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            const dest = (call.args as any).destination;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            setNavTarget(dest);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            setActiveView(ViewType.NAVIGATION);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            setTimeout(onClose, 2000);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:          } else if (call.name === 'switch_view') {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            const viewStr = (call.args as any).view.toUpperCase();
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            if (ViewType[viewStr as keyof typeof ViewType]) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:              setActiveView(ViewType[viewStr as keyof typeof ViewType]);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:              setTimeout(onClose, 2000);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:            }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:          }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:        }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      speak(aiResponse);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setMessages(prev => prev.map(m => m.text === aiResponse ? { ...m, isSpeaking: false } : m));
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    } catch (error) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      console.error("Voice command error:", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'ai', text: 'Connection lost. Check signal.' }]);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    } finally { setIsProcessing(false); }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  const toggleListen = () => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    if (isListening) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setIsListening(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      return;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    const SpeechRecognition = (window as any).SpeechRecognition || (window as any).webkitSpeechRecognition;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    if (!SpeechRecognition) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      alert("Voice recognition not supported in this browser.");
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      return;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    const recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.lang = 'en-US';
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.interimResults = false;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.onstart = () => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setIsListening(true);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.onresult = (event: any) => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      const transcript = event.results[0][0].transcript;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setInput(transcript);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setIsListening(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      // Automatically submit after a short delay to feel natural
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setTimeout(() => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:        if (transcript) {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:          const fakeEvent = { preventDefault: () => {} } as React.FormEvent;
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:          handleSubmit(fakeEvent).catch(err => console.error("Voice submit failed:", err));
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:        }
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      }, 500);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.onerror = (event: any) => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      console.error("Speech recognition error", String(event.error));
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setIsListening(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.onend = () => {
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:      setIsListening(false);
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    recognition.start();
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  };
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:  return (
components/VoiceCommand.tsx:    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-[3000] flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4">

components/RoutingTest.tsx:import React, { useState } from 'react';
components/RoutingTest.tsx:import { fetchTruckRoute } from '../src/services/hereService';
components/RoutingTest.tsx:
components/RoutingTest.tsx:const RoutingTest: React.FC = () => {
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const [origin, setOrigin] = useState('');
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const [destination, setDestination] = useState('');
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const [route, setRoute] = useState<any>(null);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  const handleGetRoute = async () => {
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    setLoading(true);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    setError(null);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    try {
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      const data = await fetchTruckRoute(origin, destination);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      setRoute(data);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    } catch (_err) {
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      setError('Failed to fetch route');
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    } finally {
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      setLoading(false);
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    }
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  };
components/RoutingTest.tsx:
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  return (
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    <div className="bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-3xl border border-white/10 p-8 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl">
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-tight mb-6">Truck Routing Test</h2>
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      <div className="space-y-4">
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        <input
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          type="text"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          placeholder="Origin (lat,lon)"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          value={origin}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          onChange={(e) => setOrigin(e.target.value)}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          className="w-full bg-[#050505] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:outline-none"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        />
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        <input
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          type="text"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          placeholder="Destination (lat,lon)"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          value={destination}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          onChange={(e) => setDestination(e.target.value)}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          className="w-full bg-[#050505] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:outline-none"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        />
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        <button
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          onClick={handleGetRoute}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          disabled={loading}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          className="w-full bg-[#D4AF37] text-black py-3 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#B8860B] transition-all"
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        >
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          {loading ? 'Calculating...' : 'Get Route'}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        </button>
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      </div>
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      {error && <p className="text-rose-500 mt-4">{error}</p>}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      {route && (
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        <pre className="mt-6 text-xs text-zinc-400 bg-zinc-900 p-4 rounded-xl overflow-auto max-h-60">
components/RoutingTest.tsx:          {JSON.stringify(route, null, 2)}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:        </pre>
components/RoutingTest.tsx:      )}
components/RoutingTest.tsx:    </div>
components/RoutingTest.tsx:  );
components/RoutingTest.tsx:};

components/RoutingTest.tsx:export default RoutingTest;

App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // HOS Logic Engine
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    const interval = setInterval(() => {
App.tsx:      const currentSpeed = speedRef.current;
App.tsx:      // Track idle time
App.tsx:      if (currentSpeed <= 5) {
App.tsx:        setIdleSeconds(prev => {
App.tsx:          const next = prev + 1;
App.tsx:          if (next === 300) {
App.tsx:            setEldStatus(current => {
App.tsx:              if (current.status !== 'OFF' && current.status !== 'SB') {
App.tsx:                setBreakSuggestion(true);
App.tsx:              }
App.tsx:              return current;
App.tsx:            });
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:          
App.tsx:          // Reset 'Until Break' timer if stationary for 30 minutes
App.tsx:          if (next === 1800) {
App.tsx:            setEldStatus(current => ({
App.tsx:              ...current,
App.tsx:              timers: current.timers.map(t => 
App.tsx:                t.label === 'Until Break' ? { ...t, seconds: t.total } : t
App.tsx:              )
App.tsx:            }));
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:          return next;
App.tsx:        });
App.tsx:      } else {
App.tsx:        setIdleSeconds(0);
App.tsx:        setBreakSuggestion(false);
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:      setEldStatus(prev => {
App.tsx:        // Automatic Driving Detection: Switch to DRIVE if speed > 5
App.tsx:        if (speedRef.current > 5 && prev.status !== 'DRIVE') {
App.tsx:          return { ...prev, status: 'DRIVE' };
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:        
App.tsx:        if (prev.status === 'OFF' || prev.status === 'SB') {
App.tsx:          // Increment reset timer (or decrement if we want a countdown)
App.tsx:          // Let's decrement from 10 hours
App.tsx:          const newReset = Math.max(0, prev.resetSeconds - 1);
App.tsx:          
App.tsx:          // If reset reaches 0, we could potentially reset other timers, 
App.tsx:          // but for now let's just track it.
App.tsx:          if (newReset === 0 && prev.resetSeconds > 0) {
App.tsx:             // Reset HOS clocks if 10h reset is complete
App.tsx:             return {
App.tsx:               ...prev,
App.tsx:               resetSeconds: 0,
App.tsx:               timers: prev.timers.map(t => ({ ...t, seconds: t.total }))
App.tsx:             };
App.tsx:          }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          return { ...prev, resetSeconds: newReset };
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        // If we are ON or DRIVE, reset the 10h reset clock
App.tsx:        const newTimers = prev.timers.map(t => {
App.tsx:          let shouldDecrement = false;
App.tsx:          
App.tsx:          if (t.label === '70h Cycle') shouldDecrement = true; // Always runs when not off-duty
App.tsx:          if (t.label === 'On-Duty Shift') shouldDecrement = true; // Runs when ON or DRIVE
App.tsx:          if (t.label === 'Drive Time' && prev.status === 'DRIVE') shouldDecrement = true;
App.tsx:          if (t.label === 'Until Break' && prev.status === 'DRIVE') shouldDecrement = true;
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          return {
App.tsx:            ...t,
App.tsx:            seconds: shouldDecrement ? Math.max(0, t.seconds - 1) : t.seconds
App.tsx:          };
App.tsx:        });
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        return { ...prev, timers: newTimers, resetSeconds: 36000 };
App.tsx:      });
App.tsx:    }, 1000);
App.tsx:    return () => clearInterval(interval);
App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  // Global High-Accuracy Geolocation Tracking
App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
App.tsx:    if (!("geolocation" in navigator)) {
App.tsx:      const saved = localStorage.getItem('trucker_last_location');
App.tsx:      setUserLocation(prev => prev || (saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [41.8781, -87.6298]));
App.tsx:      return;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:    const watchId = navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(
App.tsx:      (position) => {
App.tsx:        const { latitude, longitude, speed: geoSpeed, heading: geoHeading } = position.coords;
App.tsx:        if (isNaN(latitude) || isNaN(longitude)) {
App.tsx:          console.warn("Received NaN coordinates from GPS");
App.tsx:          return;
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:        setUserLocation(prev => {
App.tsx:          if (prev && prev[0] === latitude && prev[1] === longitude) return prev;
App.tsx:          return [latitude, longitude];
App.tsx:        });
App.tsx:        
App.tsx:        if (geoSpeed !== null && !isNaN(geoSpeed)) {
App.tsx:          // Convert m/s to mph
App.tsx:          const mph = Math.round(geoSpeed * 2.23694);
App.tsx:          setSpeed(mph);
App.tsx:        } else {
App.tsx:          setSpeed(0);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:
App.tsx:        if (geoHeading !== null && !isNaN(geoHeading)) {
App.tsx:          setHeading(geoHeading);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      },
App.tsx:      (error) => {
App.tsx:        console.warn("GPS Signal Issue:", error.message);
App.tsx:        if (!userLocation) {
App.tsx:          const saved = localStorage.getItem('trucker_last_location');
App.tsx:          setUserLocation(saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [41.8781, -87.6298]);
App.tsx:        }
App.tsx:      },
App.tsx:      { 
App.tsx:        enableHighAccuracy: true, 
App.tsx:        timeout: 15000, 
App.tsx:        maximumAge: 0 
App.tsx:      }
App.tsx:    );
App.tsx:    return () => navigator.geolocation.clearWatch(watchId);
App.tsx:  }, []);
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  const renderContent = () => {
App.tsx:    switch (activeView) {
App.tsx:      case ViewType.DASHBOARD:
App.tsx:        return <Dashboard />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.TRUCK_STOPS:
App.tsx:        return <PredictiveParking />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.LOAD_BOARD:
App.tsx:        return <LoadBoard />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.MAINTENANCE:
App.tsx:        return <Maintenance />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.NAVIGATION:
App.tsx:        return null; // Handled separately to keep it mounted
App.tsx:      case ViewType.SETTINGS:
App.tsx:        return <SettingsView />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.ROUTE_HISTORY:
App.tsx:        return <RouteHistory />;
App.tsx:      case ViewType.PAY_SUMMARY:
App.tsx:        return <PaySummary />;
App.tsx:      default:
App.tsx:        return <Dashboard />;
App.tsx:    }
App.tsx:  };
App.tsx:
App.tsx:  return (
App.tsx:    <AppContext.Provider value={{ 
App.tsx:      activeView, 
App.tsx:      setActiveView, 
App.tsx:      userLocation, 
App.tsx:      setUserLocation,
App.tsx:      navTarget, 
App.tsx:      setNavTarget,
App.tsx:      isDriving,

App.tsx:      setBreakSuggestion,
App.tsx:      hasViolation,
App.tsx:      autoReroute,
App.tsx:      setAutoReroute,
App.tsx:      truckProfile,
App.tsx:      setTruckProfile,
App.tsx:      eldStatus,
App.tsx:      setEldStatus,
App.tsx:      weeklyEarnings,
App.tsx:      setWeeklyEarnings,
App.tsx:      milesThisWeek,
App.tsx:      setMilesThisWeek,
App.tsx:      fuelCost,
App.tsx:      setFuelCost,
App.tsx:      truckCost,
App.tsx:      setTruckCost,
App.tsx:      weekDeductions,
App.tsx:      setWeekDeductions,
App.tsx:      takeHomePercentage,
App.tsx:      setTakeHomePercentage
App.tsx:    }}>
App.tsx:      <ErrorBoundary>
App.tsx:        <div className="flex h-screen w-screen bg-[#050505] text-white overflow-hidden">
App.tsx:          {apiKeyMissing && (
App.tsx:            <div className="fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[9999] bg-rose-500 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-2xl font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-2xl animate-bounce">
App.tsx:              API Key Missing - Voice Features Disabled
App.tsx:            </div>
App.tsx:          )}
App.tsx:          <Sidebar 
App.tsx:            activeView={activeView} 
App.tsx:            onViewChange={setActiveView} 
App.tsx:            onVoiceToggle={() => setIsVoiceOpen(true)} 
App.tsx:            isCollapsed={isSidebarCollapsed}
App.tsx:            onToggleCollapse={() => setIsSidebarCollapsed(!isSidebarCollapsed)}
App.tsx:          />
App.tsx:          
App.tsx:          <main className="flex-1 relative overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar bg-[#050505] pb-20 md:pb-0">
App.tsx:            <div className={activeView === ViewType.NAVIGATION ? 'absolute inset-0' : 'hidden'}>
App.tsx:              <NavigationView initialTarget={navTarget} />
App.tsx:            </div>
App.tsx:            {activeView !== ViewType.NAVIGATION && renderContent()}
App.tsx:          </main>
App.tsx:
App.tsx:          {isVoiceOpen && (
App.tsx:            <VoiceCommand 
App.tsx:              onClose={() => setIsVoiceOpen(false)} 
App.tsx:              setActiveView={setActiveView}
App.tsx:              setNavTarget={setNavTarget}
App.tsx:            />
App.tsx:          )}
App.tsx:        </div>
App.tsx:      </ErrorBoundary>
App.tsx:    </AppContext.Provider>
App.tsx:  );
App.tsx:};
